Home / Contact

Contact

How to reach the site for corrections, privacy questions, or partnerships.

For editorial contact, corrections, or partnership enquiries, email hello@beatthescam.com.

At launch, the site uses email rather than a form to keep the site fast, simple, and low-maintenance.

Editorial correctionsSend the page URL and the correction you want reviewed.
Advertising or partnershipsInclude the business name, proposal, and relevant website.
Privacy queriesReference “Privacy request” in the subject line.

Beat the Scam

Scam alerts, plain-English checks, and practical guides to help people verify suspicious emails, texts, websites, calls, and offers.

Educational content only. Not legal, regulatory, or financial advice.

Cookies & privacy

We use analytics and advertising cookies to understand performance and support the site. Choose whether to allow non-essential cookies.
